code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9
end

fn is_lower(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b >= 97 and b <= 122
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut result = ""
    mut i = 0
    mut first_word = true
    mut at_word_start = true
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if is_ws(b)
          at_word_start = true
        else
          if at_word_start
            if not first_word
              result = "#{result} "
            end
            first_word = false
            mut out_byte = b
            if is_lower(b)
              out_byte = b - 32
            end
            result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(out_byte)}"
            at_word_start = false
          else
            result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
          end
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println(result)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
